clouds.description: Clouds to create this VPC in

display_name.description: User defined display name for this VPC

peering_connections.description: List of peering connection requests for the VPC

peer_azure_app_id.description: Azure app registration id in UUID4 form that is allowed to create a peering to the peer vnet

peer_azure_tenant_id.description: Azure tenant id in UUID4 form

peer_cloud_account.description: AWS account ID, GCP project ID, Azure subscription ID of the peered VPC, or string "upcloud" for UpCloud peering connections

peer_region.description: The peer VPC's region on AWS. May be omitted or set to null if the peer is in the same region as the Aiven project VPC. Omit or set to null on GCP, Azure, or UpCloud.

peer_resource_group.description: Azure resource group name of the peered VPC

peer_vpc.description: AWS VPC ID, GCP VPC network name, Azure Virtual network name of the peered VPC, or UpCloud VPC ID

user_peer_network_cidrs.description: List of private IPv4 ranges to route through the peering connection
